== (b) the core-ratio shape: Y[0jk]/Y[1jk] over Q(i) ==
  Y[023]/Y[123] = -1562833824/5427437 - 455603508*I/5427437
    |ratio|^2 = 16836702480/187153 = {2: 4, 3: 2, 5: 1, 13: 1, 41: 1, 73: 1, 601: 1} / {17: 1, 101: 1, 109: 1}
  Y[024]/Y[124] = -62130063949606573767264/215766205487926194977 - 18112541403181407867168*I/215766205487926194977
    |ratio|^2 = 19410866465362788932904960/215766205487926194977 = {2: 11, 3: 2, 5: 1, 11: 2, 13: 1, 29: 1, 41: 1, 601: 1, 187377485473: 1} / {16633: 1, 12972176125048169: 1}
  Y[034]/Y[134] = -17384322531193149762233967768/60372375176939253423325685 - 5067847942608726714244763976*I/60372375176939253423325685
    |ratio|^2 = 1086250960565825464841971632768/12074475035387850684665137 = {2: 7, 3: 2, 13: 1, 29: 1, 41: 1, 73: 1, 101: 1, 601: 1, 1616633: 1, 8515738993: 1} / {17: 1, 710263237375755922627361: 1}
  single u across all three spectator pairs: False

== (c) the cross-ratio ==
  (Y023*Y134)/(Y034*Y123) = 1775661509660642434903313/1775664925937025369121636 + 9285580552058180539*I/1775664925937025369121636
  = 1? False
  deviation = -3416276382934218323/1775664925937025369121636 + 9285580552058180539*I/1775664925937025369121636
    Re(dev) numerator factors: {13: 1, 211: 1, 647: 1, 1924965322963: 1, -1: 1}
    Im(dev) numerator factors: {13: 1, 211: 1, 15441731: 1, 219223583: 1}

== also: the second cross-ratio (with the 024 slot, lit class) ==
  (Y023*Y124)/(Y024*Y123) = 16271648481252971729/16271671961969963216 - 369110590776791*I/178988391581669595376
  = 1? False
    Re(dev2) num factors: {3: 1, 7: 1, 59: 1, 211: 1, 14621: 1, 6143: 1, -1: 1}
    Im(dev2) num factors: {211: 1, 44381: 1, 39416401: 1, -1: 1}
== (d) the sigma*-law: Y(sigma* x, y, z triple) = conj(Y) ==
  triple (0, 2, 3): law holds exactly: True
  triple (2, 3, 4): law holds exactly: True

  cr deviation denominators: 13-free: True; 211-free: True
